channel.title: Follow Builders — X/Twitter
channel.description: AI builders' latest tweets, curated by follow-builders

item.title:
Claude (@claudeai): Computer use is now in Claude Code.
Claude can open your apps, click through your UI, and test what...
item.description:
Computer use is now in Claude Code.
Claude can open your apps, click through your UI, and test what it built, right from the CLI.
Now in research preview on Pro and Max plans. https://t.co/s2FDQaDmr1
Bio: Claude is an AI assistant built by @anthropicai to be safe, accurate, and secure. Talk to Claude on https://t.co/ZhTwG8d1e5 or download the app. ❤️ 11545 🔁 878
